de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution
 

  • Uses of AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution that return AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal
    AbstractUpdateExtractor.iterateBackOnParents(AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal nodeToStartAt, boolean force)
    Performs a backward iteration on the parents starting at the given AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal until the first parent with at least two open branches has been found.

    AbstractUpdateExtractor.iterateBackOnParents(AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal nodeToStartAt, boolean force)
    Performs a backward iteration on the parents starting at the given AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal until the first parent with at least two open branches has been found.
    Method parameters in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution with type arguments of type AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected boolean
    AbstractUpdateExtractor.isParentReachedOnAllChildGoals(Node currentNode, List<AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal> branchLeafs)
    Checks if parent backward iteration on all given AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal has reached the given Node.
